task.title: Install the DITA Package Processor
task.shortdesc: Install the processor in a Python virtual environment so CLI commands and plugin loading run with the expected dependencies.

prereq.p: Install Python 3.10 or later and clone the repository to your local machine.
If this is your first run, keep this repository checked out and use the docs-user directory later as a safe practice package.

step.cmd: Create and activate a virtual environment from the repository root.
Install runtime dependencies and the package in editable mode.
Verify that the CLI starts and prints help.
Optional: install shell completion support if your workflow uses completion scripts.

info.codeblock: pip install argcomplete python3 -m dita_package_processor completion --shell zsh

result.p: You can run discover, normalize, plan, execute, run, and plugin commands from the active environment.
